question: Which year from 2005-2010 has the lowest average Mega Ball? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A gaming analyst wants to compare yearly Mega Ball averages to check for shifts in draw outcomes.

1.fact: Averaging Mega Ball by draw year for 2005-2010, 2007 has the lowest average at 22.155339805825243.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2005-2010 has the lowest average Mega Ball? (Parse Draw Date to Year; compute the mean Mega Ball by Year; select the minimum.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Compute the average Mega Ball by year (2005-2010) and select the minimum; the lowest year is 2007.
